creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Feedback received by netchild:

Alexander Leidinger, 14.10.08, 14:32h CEST:

> >> I think 10 is the current version of icc. As far as Intel acted with
> >> the versions of icc which I maintained before, I don't think much
> >> newly registered people can download version 9 after version 10 is
> >> released.
> >
> > In that case, the port should probably be upgraded to the latest version
> > or not at all.
> 
> Yes. And I suggest to make a repo copy of the current port to a  
> versioned name. This way people with access to such old versions which  
> still want to use them, can install the corresponding port, while  
> "icc" is the most recent version.
